description_long: This is a rectangular box of Emperador cookies, specifically the 'Sabor Lemon Pie' flavor. The front face features the Emperador brand name in large, elegant script, with a stack of cookies and lemon graphics to visually indicate the flavor. The box is primarily black with gold and yellow accents, giving it a premium and eye-catching appearance. The back side contains detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and branding elements, while the sides are simpler, displaying the brand and product name. The packaging appears to be made of cardboard, typical for snack boxes, and is likely lightweight and easy to carry. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for display in urban convenience stores or supermarkets.
description: A rectangular black and gold Emperador cookie box with lemon pie flavor graphics and detailed branding. The packaging is sleek, with prominent brand and flavor indications.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Emperador logo, product name, and lemon pie flavor graphics with cookies and lemons.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the Emperador logo and product name on a gold background, with minimal additional detail.
description_view_2: Back view featuring nutritional information, ingredients, and additional branding on a black background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Emperador logo and product name, similar to the other side, on a gold background.
attribute_brand_logo: The Emperador brand logo is visible on the front and sides of the box, featuring elegant script in white and gold on a black and gold background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the box displays 'Sabor Lemon Pie' in bold text, along with images of cookies and lemons to indicate the lemon pie flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the box, including a nutrition facts panel and other product details.
